title: Reset Password
content: Users can reset their password from Settings > Security > Reset Password. Enter your email and follow the link sent to your inbox.

title: Refund Policy
content: Refunds are allowed within 7 days of purchase. Contact support@example.com with your order ID to initiate the process.

title: Account Deletion
content: To delete your account, go to Settings > Account > Delete Account. This action is permanent and irreversible.

title: Subscription Plans
content: We offer Free, Pro ($9/mo), and Enterprise ($49/mo) plans. Upgrade anytime from your Billing settings page.

title: Two-Factor Authentication
content: Enable 2FA from Settings > Security > Two-Factor Auth. We support Google Authenticator apps and SMS verification.
